reviews.review_msg: Professor Everton's 111W class is challenging but worth it. His engaging lectures and useful feedback make it a rewarding experience. For study prep, tools like unstuck AI and the free textbook are super helpful.

In my last semester as an English major and feel like every other prof here pales in comparison. He somehow makes Moby Dick interesting. He's also easy on the eyes with a nice voice which makes it easier to show up to class. He likes participation a lot, by the way.
It would be impossible to take this class and not catch his enthusiasm for Melville and Moby-Dick. Made me and my classmates absolutely fall in love with Melville. Such an excellent teacher.

If you ever come across a class taught by Everton, TAKE IT!! You won't regret it! He's a genuinely great guy who cares a LOT about you and your success in class. Most approachable prof I've ever had. A bit of a tough marker on writing, but he will teach you good strategies you can use. His feedback is in depth & helps you with the next assignment!

Michael is one of the best professors I have ever had. You can see his passion for English and the material in his lectures, and he hooks you to what he is saying everytime. His humour and caring nature helps you stay engaged and there is not too much work for the course other than readings.

Everton is an amazing professor who made me fall back in love with English! His assigned readings and lectures are engaging and he genuinely wants everyone to learn and succeed in his class. Tutorials are discussion-based (attendance marked) and useful for understanding the complex novels. Show up and put in the effort and you will do well!

Probably the best prof at SFU. He cares very deeply at SFU and gives really great feedback if you meet up with him to discuss your exams/essays. His lectures are so entertaining and have so much information so as long as you show up to lectures, you really don't need to study or anything. Don't skip the lectures, they're so worth it.

I took my first English class (Engl 211) with him and It's fair to say he is an outstanding prof. His lectures provide great insight into the text and prepare you well for his assignments/exams. He cares very deeply about his students. We had a late exam and he waited at the bus stop for every student to safely board the bus.
He's definitely a good professor but if you're looking for a GPA booster, this course isn't it if you're not a strong writer.
A VERY special professor. Double edged sword though because if you take him, be assured that every other professor you have will pale in comparison.
